title: Add New Document button + inline form to /vault explorer
implementation_notes: In app/pages/vault/index.vue add: showCreateForm ref (default false), newTitle ref, newContent ref, createError ref, isSubmitting ref.
Add a 'New Document' button in the header area (next to the search input). On click: showCreateForm = true.
Render the form as a card above the document list when showCreateForm is true: title input (required), content textarea (optional, ~4 rows), Cancel + Create buttons.
Create button: POST /api/vault/documents with { title: newTitle, content: newContent }. On success: close form, reset fields, call refreshNuxtData or re-fetch /api/vault/documents.
On error: show createError message inside the form.
Also add a 'Create your first document' CTA in the empty state (when filteredDocs.length === 0 and searchQuery is empty) that opens the same form.
The existing search, Index Status sidebar, and document list behaviour must remain unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'New Document' reveals the inline form.
Submitting with a title creates the file and the new document appears in the list immediately.
Submitting with empty title shows an inline validation message and does not close the form.
Empty state shows a Create CTA when no documents exist and no search is active.
completion_summary: Added a New Document button, inline creation form, empty-state CTA, and immediate list refresh to the /vault explorer.
